security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data:; font-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' http://127.0.0.1:* http://localhost:* https://127.0.0.1:* https://localhost:*; worker-src 'self'; manifest-src 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'

bundle.shortDescription: Mobile-first console for mmWave 60 GHz radar vital-sign monitoring.
bundle.longDescription: Operator console for the Radar Vital trainer that connects to a local Python trainer or a LAN-paired trainer to monitor vitals at 1 Hz, run preflight checks, and review ML-readiness verdicts.
